text.title: Stripe Webhook Handler Pattern Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: invoice.paid handler with Redis idempotency
example.note: Verifies via stripe.Webhook.construct_event; SETNX evt:{event.id} -> if false return 200; else enqueue task into Celery; failures push to Redis DLQ list; pytest replay test asserts second processing is a no-op. Owner: ruslan@faion.net.

example.title: vibes handler
example.note: No signature check, no dedup, 12s inline work, no DLQ. After launch: 4 double-charges, 2 missed fulfilments, 1 forged event.
